title: senecio algens
intro: Senecio algens is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PA), which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Consuming the plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, but it should be used with caution due to potential toxicity. In herbal preparations, Senecio algens is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
